responsibilities: Perform finite element analysis to evaluate structural integrity, stress distribution, and durability of mechanical components
Build and refine finite element meshes to accurately represent complex geometries while maintaining solver efficiency
Conduct linear static, modal, fatigue, and nonlinear simulations to validate designs against load and safety requirements
Interpret simulation results and provide clear design recommendations to mechanical and product design engineers
Correlate FEA predictions with physical test data to validate model accuracy and refine boundary conditions
Support topology optimization studies to reduce part weight while maintaining structural performance targets
Document analysis methodologies, assumptions, and results in formal engineering reports for design reviews
Collaborate with design teams early in the development cycle to influence design decisions using simulation-driven insights
Automate repetitive analysis workflows using scripting to improve simulation turnaround time and consistency
